ops.title: wall_of_text rubric eval panel snapshot (2026-07-05)
ops.body: Snapshot of /tmp/show-rubric-panel taken 2026-07-05 for task 2939d87 (flaky negatives nb04/nb05/nb06). 16+ live-LLM rubric cases (f01–f10 positives, nb01–nb10 negatives) plus manifest.json and per-case out/err logs, captured at show pack v0.1.2/v0.1.3 during round 4. Restore with: cc-notes attachment get <this-note> show-rubric-panel.tar.gz -o - | tar xz. Attachment content moves on cc-notes sync only, not plain git fetch.
